risks.description: Some public music-production corpora may share upstream projects, artists, or derived mixes.
risks.requiredResolution: Create a source identity registry and keep any suspected overlap in the same split or excluded.

risks.description: SolidStateBusComp is derived from Cambridge songs processed through compressor settings.
risks.requiredResolution: Group all source songs and all parameter settings with their Cambridge source project.

risks.description: SonicMasterDataset is Jamendo-derived and MTG-Jamendo is also based on Jamendo tracks.
risks.requiredResolution: Use upstream Jamendo IDs when available and prevent original works from crossing splits.

risks.description: FMA contains multiple tracks from the same artists and albums.
risks.requiredResolution: Split by artist/album identity rather than file identity.

risks.description: Synthetic degradation, compressor sweeps, MIDI renders, and generated variants can create many files from one source.
risks.requiredResolution: Assign a derived family ID and split all variants together.
